title: BedLock
description: Adds specific restrictions for setting spawn point
body:
# BedLock
Bedlock is a mod adding two effects:

- **Calmness** - effect allowing you to set your spawn point on sleep

- **Anxiety** - effect disallowing you to set your spawn point on sleep

It also adds a gamerule allowing you to control this behaviour:

**enforceCalmnessEffect** - requires Calmness effect to set a spawnpoint.
